original: Don’t understand the hooplah about New Texas? Think black and white is boring? Want your hard working milkers dressed in a uniform befitting to their task and Dhaal’s twilight-infused sensibilities? Look no further than the purple cow nursing bra! This beautiful garment has been proven to increase milk sales by at least 12.72% in gabilani-lead trials, and with the extraneous flaps removed, your girls’ tits will hang free, just as nature intended.
